cedict_en: to settle (a dispute out of court)/to reconcile/settlement/conciliation/to become reconciled
callous; heartless/to resolve (to do sth)/firm resolve (as in 下狠心[xia4 hen3 xin1])
wishing one could do sth; to hate to be unable; itching to do sth
to groan/to snort/to hum/to croon/humph! | interjection expressing dissatisfaction or suspicion
to cause a sensation/to create a stir in (a place)/commotion/controversy
roar of laughter (onom.)/hubbub/to roar (as a crowd) | to deceive/to coax/to amuse (a child) | variant of 鬨|哄[hong4] | tumult/uproar/commotion/disturbance
to bake/to heat by fire/to set off by contrast
money wrapped in red as a gift/bonus payment/kickback/bribe
see 宏偉區|宏伟区[Hong2 wei3 Qu1] | grand/imposing/magnificent
